ValidationRule.description: The Firm Type is required to move the Opportunity into the "Sales Process" stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Sales Process"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Negotiating"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Signed"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Joined") ) ,ISPICKVAL(Firm_Type__c, "") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter the Firm Type before moving the Opportunity into Sales Process or Beyond.
